raw_consumer_statement: XX/XX/XXXX their was fraud on my personal credit card for {$3600.00} and I immediately reported it. Amex issued a fraud credit then send an email on XX/XX/XXXX that they were debiting my account as I provided my account info to merchant. Merchant is XXXX XXXX and I have never heard of them. Amex falsely accused me of sending my account info on XXXX XXXX when I was with my family. Amex isnt following the agreement of 0 % fraud liability. Amex falsely accused me of providing my account info to a merchant I have never done business with that is out of state.
